title: rosa mollissima var. arduennensis
intro: Rosa mollissima var. arduennensis, also known as the Rosa arduennensis, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rosa mollissima plant species, native to China and used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rosa arduennensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rosa arduennensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
